content.transcript: Thanks for using Morrowward. Dave asked for a little encouragement. Benjamin Franklin wrote, “Little strokes fell great oaks.” Small weekly steps can shape a long horizon.
content.attribution: Benjamin Franklin, Poor Richard Improved, 1750, August (VI Month); Founders Online

source.usage: The narration uses this short public-domain quotation with capitalization, archival line break, and comma normalized; its wording and word order are unchanged, and all surrounding words are original Morrowward copy.

disclosures.interpretation: AI-generated historical interpretation of Benjamin Franklin. This is not an authentic likeness, archival recording, endorsement, or recreation of his voice.
disclosures.voice: AI-generated narration using an xAI built-in voice. It is not Benjamin Franklin’s voice and does not imitate a historical recording.
disclosures.playback: Optional media with user-initiated playback, English captions, a transcript, and a reduced-motion poster experience.

basis: Codex/GPT original-resolution and frame-sequence review passed every hard gate and scored 29 of 30.
Human final review of the composed 15-second greeting: “Video is perfect!”
